    {{ site.author.name }}

    {{ site.author.bio }}

    {% assign related = site.posts | where_exp: "post", "post.url != page.url" %} {% assign related_filtered = "" | split: "" %} {% for post in related %} {% for tag in page.tags %} {% if post.tags contains tag %} {% unless related_filtered contains post %} {% assign related_filtered = related_filtered | push: post %} {% endunless %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endfor %} {% if related_filtered.size > 0 %}

    You might also like

    {% for post in related_filtered limit:3 %}
    {{ post.date | date: "%b %d, %Y" }} {% for tag in post.tags limit:1 %} {{ tag }} {% endfor %}

    {{ post.title }}

    {{ post.excerpt | strip_html | truncatewords: 20 }}

    {% endif %}
